summary: Iteration 6: Multi-Agency (Multi-tenant) System Testing - All features working. Backend: 14/15 tests passed (1 skipped due to date conflict). Frontend: All tested features working correctly including admin login, agency management, booking with cash payment.

minor.issue: 'pending_cash' status shows as raw value instead of French label in some contexts

issues: 'Documents manquants' warning banner is informational - cash booking still works correctly

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_Agency_xxx entries created from backend tests - these can be cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant system fully operational. Super admin (test@example.com) linked to LogiRent Geneva with 15 vehicles, 31 reservations. Admin2 (admin2@logirent.ch) linked to LogiRent Lausanne with 0 vehicles. Cash booking creates reservations with status 'pending_cash' and agency_id from vehicle.

register_admin_endpoint.details: POST /api/auth/register-admin creates new agency + admin user with role='admin'

agencies_crud_endpoints.details: GET /api/agencies (super=all, admin=own), POST (super only), PUT/DELETE (super only)

admin_stats_agency_scoped.details: GET /api/admin/stats returns stats scoped by agency for admins, all for super_admin

admin_reservations_scoped.details: GET /api/admin/reservations returns reservations scoped by agency

admin_users_scoped.details: GET /api/admin/users returns users who booked with the agency

cash_booking_no_document_block.details: POST /api/reservations with payment_method=cash works without document check, returns status=pending_cash with agency_id

frontend_admin_login_page.details: Admin login at /admin-login shows login form with dark violet theme, toggle to register

frontend_admin_register_form.details: Register form shows Nom complet, Nom de l'agence fields, 'Créer mon agence' button

frontend_admin_panel_badges.details: Admin panel shows agency name badge (yellow), role badge (Super Admin/Admin)

frontend_super_admin_agences_tab.details: Super admin sees 'Agences' tab, can view/create/edit/delete agencies with stats

frontend_booking_cash_payment.details: Booking page shows 3 payment options, selecting 'Espèces' changes button to 'Réserver (Espèces)'
